Risk_Description: Unauthorized access to AI endpoints triggering data exfiltration
Mitigation_Strategy: VPC Service Controls, Private Endpoints, API Gateway with WAF, Cloud Armor

Risk_Description: Training data contains PII without proper consent/anonymization
Model produces biased outputs against protected groups
Mitigation_Strategy: Fairness Indicators, What-If Tool, Human review, Threshold controls

Risk_Description: Model drift causing degraded prediction accuracy
Mitigation_Strategy: Vertex AI Model Monitoring, Automated retraining triggers, Alerting

Risk_Description: GenAI token API costs exceeding budget by >50%
Mitigation_Strategy: Caching layer (Memorystore/ElastiCache), Rate limiting, Commitment-based pricing

Risk_Description: Third-party AI model provider changes deprecation policy
Mitigation_Strategy: Multi-model strategy, Abstraction layer, Vendor lock-in review during architecture

Risk_Description: Prompt injection attacks on conversational AI agents
Mitigation_Strategy: Input validation, Prompt guardrails, Output filtering, ConversationGuard (Vertex AI)

Risk_Description: Incomplete or skewed training data leading to poor model performance
Mitigation_Strategy: Data profiling (Dataplex/Catalog), Quality rules, Great Expectations, AutoML data validation

Risk_Description: AI service outage impacting downstream business functions
Mitigation_Strategy: Multi-region failover, Circuit breakers, Fallback to rule-based logic, SLOs defined

Risk_Description: Model memorization exposing training data through inference
Mitigation_Strategy: Differential privacy (DP), Federated learning, Post-training privacy audits

Risk_Description: MLOps pipeline failure causing stale model serving
Mitigation_Strategy: Pipeline monitoring, Rollback automation, Canary deployments, A/B testing gates

Risk_Description: AI-generated content violates copyright or IP licensing
Mitigation_Strategy: Content filtering, Source attribution, Legal review workflow, Output watermarking
